title.en: Inside LRP: The Link-local Registration Protocol and Its Data-Transport Engine
title.zh: 深入 LRP：链路本地注册协议及其数据传输引擎

blocks.en: The Link-local Registration Protocol (LRP) is a generic delivery service for one task: copying a database from one device to its direct link neighbor, reliably and efficiently, without LRP itself needing to understand what the data means. Think of it as a careful courier that replicates a binder of records across a single wire. This lesson walks Clause 6 (the architecture and design rationale) and Clause 7 (the LRP-DT data-transport machinery), giving every subclause an intuitive home. Two key roles recur throughout: an applicant database is the copy you own and want to push out, and a registrar database is the copy your neighbor receives and holds for you. A Portal is the entity at each end that manages one applicant/registrar database pair for one application on one port.
blocks.zh: 链路本地注册协议（Link-local Registration Protocol，简称 LRP）是一种通用的传输服务，只做一件事：把一台设备上的数据库可靠且高效地复制到它的直连链路邻居，而 LRP 本身无需理解这些数据的含义。可以把它想象成一位细致的快递员，沿着一根线缆把一整本记录册复制到对端。本课讲解 Clause 6（架构与设计理念）和 Clause 7（LRP-DT 数据传输机制），为每个子条款找到直观的归宿。贯穿全文的两个关键角色是：申请者数据库（applicant database）是你拥有并希望推送出去的副本，注册者数据库（registrar database）是邻居为你接收并保存的副本。门户（Portal）是每端管理某一应用、某一端口上一对申请者/注册者数据库的实体。

blocks.en: Clause 6.1 (Introduction) lists the roadmap of Clause 6; Clause 6.2 (Overview) draws the central picture: LRP splits into two stacked layers. The upper layer is LRP-DS (LRP Database Synchronization) — the part that actually decides which records to send to keep the two databases in step. The lower layer is LRP-DT (LRP Data Transport) — a point-to-point pipe that paces transmissions so the receiver's buffers do not overflow, acknowledges and retransmits data, and delivers in order. Because LRP-DT already guarantees reliable, ordered delivery, LRP-DS has no retransmission machinery of its own. The units of exchange are LRPDUs (LRP Data Units). LRP-DT can run over either of two underlying transports, which we meet shortly. Clause 6.3.1 (Objectives of LRP) sets the goals: stay independent of the application's data syntax, let instances discover peers and form/break associations, offer transport options (capability vs complexity trade-offs), transfer changes efficiently without resending whole databases (sized on the order of 1 Mbyte per port), and support resource-constrained and proxied systems. Clause 6.3.2 (Non-objectives) draws the boundaries: LRP deliberately does not provide point-to-multipoint associations, nor cross-record consistency features like database locking — those belong to an application if needed.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.1（引言）列出 Clause 6 的路线图；Clause 6.2（概述）勾勒核心图景：LRP 分为上下两层。上层是 LRP-DS（LRP 数据库同步，LRP Database Synchronization）——真正决定发送哪些记录以使两个数据库保持一致的部分。下层是 LRP-DT（LRP 数据传输，LRP Data Transport）——一条点对点的管道，它对发送进行节流以免压垮接收方缓冲区，对数据进行确认与重传，并保证按序交付。由于 LRP-DT 已经保证了可靠、有序的交付，LRP-DS 自身便不需要任何重传机制。交换的单位是 LRPDU（LRP 数据单元，LRP Data Unit）。LRP-DT 可运行在两种底层传输之一上，稍后即会介绍。Clause 6.3.1（LRP 的目标）确立了目标：与应用数据语法保持独立、让实例能发现对等方并建立/断开关联、提供多种传输选项（能力与复杂度的权衡）、高效传输变化而无需重发整个数据库（每端口规模约为 1 MB），并支持资源受限系统与被代理系统。Clause 6.3.2（非目标）划清了边界：LRP 有意不提供点对多点关联，也不提供诸如数据库锁定之类的跨记录一致性特性——若有需要，这些应由应用自行实现。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="40" y="20" width="280" height="30"/><text x="180" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">LRP application layer</text><rect x="40" y="60" width="280" height="30"/><text x="180" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">LRP-DS  (synchronization, 6.10)</text><rect x="40" y="100" width="280" height="30"/><text x="180" y="119" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">LRP-DT  (transport, 6.9)</text><rect x="60" y="150" width="110" height="28"/><text x="115" y="168" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">ECP</text><rect x="190" y="150" width="110" height="28"/><text x="245" y="168" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">TCP</text></svg>

caption.en: The LRP stack (Figure 6-1): an application sits on LRP-DS, which rides on LRP-DT, which in turn runs over either ECP or TCP.
caption.zh: LRP 协议栈（图 6-1）：应用位于 LRP-DS 之上，LRP-DS 依托 LRP-DT，而 LRP-DT 又运行在 ECP 或 TCP 之上。

blocks.en: Clause 6.4 introduces three system roles. A Native system holds the application, the Portals, and the target port all together. A Controlled system holds only the target port (the physical port LRP cares about) but offloads its application and Portals elsewhere. A Proxy system holds the application and Portals but has no target port of its own — it acts on behalf of one or more Controlled systems. ("not-controlled" simply means Native or Proxy.) This split is what lets a central network controller run an application's logic for many simple devices at once. Clause 6.5 explains how a system learns about its neighbor's target port: it can run IEEE 802.1AB LLDP (Link Layer Discovery Protocol) to advertise and discover Portals via the LRP ECP/TCP Discovery TLVs, or the same facts can be configured statically. Target ports are identified network-wide by their Chassis ID + Port ID, which must be unique.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.4 引入三种系统角色。本地系统（Native system）将应用、门户和目标端口（target port，LRP 所关心的物理端口）集于一身。受控系统（Controlled system）只保留目标端口，而把应用和门户卸载到别处。代理系统（Proxy system）保留应用和门户，自身却没有目标端口——它代表一个或多个受控系统行事。（“非受控”即指本地系统或代理系统。）正是这种拆分，使得中央网络控制器能够同时为众多简单设备运行应用逻辑。Clause 6.5 说明系统如何获知邻居的目标端口：它可以运行 IEEE 802.1AB LLDP（链路层发现协议，Link Layer Discovery Protocol），通过 LRP ECP/TCP 发现 TLV 来通告并发现门户；这些信息也可静态配置。目标端口在全网范围内由其机箱 ID + 端口 ID（Chassis ID + Port ID）标识，且必须唯一。

blocks.en: Clause 6.6 adds a lightweight discovery shortcut: an Exploratory Hello LRPDU. It is a Hello that advertises only the sender's own target port (My Chassis ID / My Port ID TLVs) and omits the neighbor's identity, so a device can announce itself without first knowing who is on the other end. Exploratory Hellos run only over ECP, never TCP, because ECP has exactly one neighbor per target port — there is no ambiguity about who the message is for.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.6 增加了一个轻量的发现捷径：探测性 Hello LRPDU（Exploratory Hello LRPDU）。它只通告发送方自己的目标端口（My Chassis ID / My Port ID TLV），而省略邻居身份，因此设备无需先知道对端是谁即可宣告自己。探测性 Hello 只能跑在 ECP 上，绝不用 TCP，因为 ECP 的每个目标端口恰好只有一个邻居——消息发给谁不存在歧义。

blocks.en: Clause 6.7 (Target port state) makes a subtle point: although each Portal is tied to a target port, the port's up/down state has no direct effect on the LRP state machines. Different applications react to a flapping port differently, and a Proxy system only has second-hand knowledge of its Controlled system's ports anyway. A failed port may indirectly cause symptoms — over ECP, no LRPDUs flow so Hellos time out; over TCP, the socket may break and tear down the LRP-DT instance — but the standard leaves the policy to the application. Clause 6.8 (LRP database structure) imposes just enough structure to be efficient: a database is split into records, each carrying a unique record identifier, a sequence number, a checksum over the whole record, and one or more octets of opaque data. Splitting into records lets LRP ship only what changed instead of resending the entire database, and lets it acknowledge and verify integrity without understanding the contents.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.7（目标端口状态）点明一个微妙之处：尽管每个门户都绑定到一个目标端口，但端口的通断状态对 LRP 状态机并无直接影响。不同应用对端口抖动的反应各异，而代理系统对其受控系统端口的了解本来就是间接的。端口故障可能间接引发症状——在 ECP 上没有 LRPDU 流动，于是 Hello 超时；在 TCP 上套接字可能断开并拆除 LRP-DT 实例——但标准把策略交给应用决定。Clause 6.8（LRP 数据库结构）只施加恰好够用的结构以保证高效：数据库被拆成记录（record），每条记录携带一个唯一的记录标识符、一个序列号、一个覆盖整条记录的校验和，以及一段或多段不透明数据。拆成记录使 LRP 只需传送发生变化的部分而无需重发整个数据库，并能在不理解内容的前提下完成确认与完整性校验。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[Applicant DB] -->|Record LRPDU| R[Registrar DB]
  R -->|Partial List LRPDU = ack| A
  R -.->|Complete List LRPDU = periodic check| A
  A -.->|Hello LRPDU keeps link alive| R
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[申请者数据库] -->|Record LRPDU| R[注册者数据库]
  R -->|Partial List LRPDU = 确认| A
  R -.->|Complete List LRPDU = 周期校验| A
  A -.->|Hello LRPDU 维持链路| R

blocks.en: Clause 6.9 defines the two LRP-DT transports. Clause 6.9.1 (ECP mechanism) uses the Edge Control Protocol from IEEE 802.1Q. ECP runs directly over the target port, so only a Native system can use it; one ECPDU frame can carry several LRPDUs, but no single LRPDU may span frames, which caps record size below the medium's frame size. ECP fails silently after a few retries, so confining each LRPDU to one frame ensures only whole LRPDUs are ever lost. Clause 6.9.2 (TCP mechanism) carries LRPDUs over a TCP connection (using POSIX/IEEE 1003.1 sockets), supporting up to 65 535 octets per LRPDU and any number of Portal associations multiplexed by the My Portal Number field. A socket is opened either with an Active TCP OPEN (6.9.2.1: socket(), optional bind(), connect()) or a Passive TCP OPEN (6.9.2.2: socket(), bind(), listen(), accept()). Clause 6.9.2.3 notes there is no fixed LRP TCP port number; it is advertised in the LRP TCP Discovery TLV. Clause 6.9.3 (Quality of Service) warns that LRPDU frames should not bypass the queuing that real-time traffic depends on — a high-priority best-effort class is usually a good fit.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.9 定义了 LRP-DT 的两种传输。Clause 6.9.1（ECP 机制）使用来自 IEEE 802.1Q 的边缘控制协议（Edge Control Protocol，ECP）。ECP 直接运行在目标端口之上，因此只有本地系统才能使用；一个 ECPDU 帧可承载多个 LRPDU，但单个 LRPDU 不得跨帧，这使记录大小被限制在介质帧长之下。ECP 在数次重试后会静默失败，因此将每个 LRPDU 限定在单帧内，可确保丢失的只会是完整的 LRPDU。Clause 6.9.2（TCP 机制）通过 TCP 连接（使用 POSIX/IEEE 1003.1 套接字）承载 LRPDU，每个 LRPDU 最多 65 535 个八位字节，并以 My Portal Number 字段复用任意数量的门户关联。套接字可通过主动 TCP OPEN（6.9.2.1：socket()、可选 bind()、connect()）或被动 TCP OPEN（6.9.2.2：socket()、bind()、listen()、accept()）建立。Clause 6.9.2.3 指出 LRP 没有固定的 TCP 端口号，它由 LRP TCP 发现 TLV 通告。Clause 6.9.3（服务质量）提醒：承载 LRPDU 的帧不应绕过实时流量所依赖的排队机制——通常高优先级的尽力而为等级是合适的选择。

blocks.en: Clause 6.10 covers LRP-DS, the synchronization layer, modeled on IS-IS Link State Advertisements. Clause 6.10.1 (Protocol operation) names four LRPDUs: a Hello LRPDU establishes and maintains the association; a Record LRPDU carries a record (sent applicant-to-registrar to add, change, or delete); a Partial List LRPDU returns a subset of {record id, sequence, checksum} triplets as an acknowledgment; and a Complete List LRPDU lists all triplets, sent periodically by the registrar to check the two databases still match. (A fifth "Stop LRPDU" is just padding to meet minimum frame length.) Clause 6.10.2 (database storage) traces the nine-step data path: per-system info is broken into records, checksums and sequence numbers are added, records are packed into Record LRPDUs, LRP-DT moves them, and the registrar saves the bookkeeping and passes the opaque data up to be reassembled. Clause 6.11 (State machine creation) ties it together: the imTargetPortList table (built from application requests) drives creation of LRP-DT instances, which in turn create Portals — and a Portal can also be born when the first Hello LRPDU arrives from a neighbor.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.10 讲解同步层 LRP-DS，其设计借鉴 IS-IS 的链路状态通告。Clause 6.10.1（协议运作）列出四种 LRPDU：Hello LRPDU 建立并维持关联；Record LRPDU 承载一条记录（由申请者发往注册者以新增、修改或删除）；Partial List LRPDU 返回 {记录 id、序列号、校验和} 三元组的一个子集作为确认；Complete List LRPDU 列出全部三元组，由注册者周期性发送以检查两个数据库是否仍然一致。（第五种“Stop LRPDU”只是为满足最小帧长而做的填充。）Clause 6.10.2（数据库存储）追踪九步数据通路：按系统的信息被拆成记录，加上校验和与序列号，记录被打包进 Record LRPDU，由 LRP-DT 搬运，注册者保存这些簿记信息并把不透明数据上交以重新组装。Clause 6.11（状态机创建）把全局串联起来：imTargetPortList 表（由应用请求构建）驱动 LRP-DT 实例的创建，进而创建门户——而当邻居发来第一个 Hello LRPDU 时，门户也可由此诞生。

blocks.en: Clause 6.12 (Security considerations): since LRP rides on a transport, it inherits that transport's protections. ECP can use MACsec (802.1AE); because every data LRPDU carries a sequence number, replay of data/list LRPDUs is already a non-issue, and MACsec additionally blocks Hello replays (which TCP also prevents). TCP connections can be further secured with IPsec or TLS. The exact use of these is left to deployments.
blocks.zh: Clause 6.12（安全考量）：由于 LRP 依托于传输层，它继承了该传输的保护能力。ECP 可使用 MACsec（802.1AE）；因为每个数据 LRPDU 都带有序列号，数据/列表 LRPDU 的重放本就不成问题，而 MACsec 还能额外阻止 Hello 重放（TCP 同样可防此问题）。TCP 连接可进一步用 IPsec 或 TLS 加固。这些机制的具体使用由部署方决定。

blocks.en: Clause 7 zooms into the LRP-DT engine. Clause 7.1 (Introduction) says it covers how LRP-DT instances are created and destroyed (7.2) and how a running instance behaves (7.3). An LRP-DT instance is one end of a transport connection to exactly one neighbor instance; over TCP it can serve many target ports and many Portals, while over ECP it serves a single target port. Clause 7.2.1 (overview) lays out the lifecycle: a Local Target Port request calls ProcessLocalTargetRequest to register your own port; a Neighbor Target Port request calls ProcessNeighborTargetRequest to register the far end and create the Portal (and, for TCP, the LRP-DT instance with an Active TCP OPEN). A passive socket fielding an incoming connection triggers ProcessTcpOpen, which makes an instance but no Portal until a Hello arrives. Duplicate TCP connections can momentarily create twin instances; the Receive Hello logic later prunes the loser.
blocks.zh: Clause 7 聚焦于 LRP-DT 引擎。Clause 7.1（引言）说明它涵盖 LRP-DT 实例如何创建与销毁（7.2），以及运行中的实例如何行为（7.3）。一个 LRP-DT 实例是通往恰好一个邻居实例的传输连接的一端；在 TCP 上它可服务多个目标端口和多个门户，而在 ECP 上只服务单个目标端口。Clause 7.2.1（概述）铺陈了生命周期：本地目标端口请求调用 ProcessLocalTargetRequest 注册你自己的端口；邻居目标端口请求调用 ProcessNeighborTargetRequest 注册对端并创建门户（对 TCP 还会创建带主动 TCP OPEN 的 LRP-DT 实例）。被动套接字接收到来连接时触发 ProcessTcpOpen，它创建实例但在 Hello 到来前不创建门户。重复的 TCP 连接可能瞬间产生孪生实例；随后的 Receive Hello 逻辑会裁掉失败的一方。

blocks.en:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> LI_START
  LI_START --> LI_START_ACTIVE_OPEN: TCP and active
  LI_START --> LI_OPERATIONAL: ECP (no OPEN)
  LI_START_ACTIVE_OPEN --> LI_OPERATIONAL: connect success
  LI_OPERATIONAL --> LI_LRPDU: LRPDU received
  LI_LRPDU --> LI_OPERATIONAL
  LI_OPERATIONAL --> LI_ACTIVE_TCP_FAILED: TCP failed
  LI_ACTIVE_TCP_FAILED --> LI_RESTART: reconnect timer = 0
  LI_OPERATIONAL --> LI_TERMINATING: instKillInstance
  LI_TERMINATING --> LI_TERMINATED
blocks.zh:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> LI_START
  LI_START --> LI_START_ACTIVE_OPEN: TCP 且主动
  LI_START --> LI_OPERATIONAL: ECP (无需 OPEN)
  LI_START_ACTIVE_OPEN --> LI_OPERATIONAL: connect 成功
  LI_OPERATIONAL --> LI_LRPDU: 收到 LRPDU
  LI_LRPDU --> LI_OPERATIONAL
  LI_OPERATIONAL --> LI_ACTIVE_TCP_FAILED: TCP 失败
  LI_ACTIVE_TCP_FAILED --> LI_RESTART: 重连计时器归零
  LI_OPERATIONAL --> LI_TERMINATING: instKillInstance
  LI_TERMINATING --> LI_TERMINATED

summary.en: Coverage map: every Clause 7 subclause, by exact number
summary.zh: 覆盖图：Clause 7 各子条款（精确编号）

blocks.en: Clause 7.2.2 (Instance maintenance variables) — 7.2.2.1 imTargetPortList: the master table residing in each Native or Proxy system. Each entry keys on the triple {imPplAppId, imPplMyChassisId, imPplMyPortId} and carries imPplMyEcpEnable, imPplMyTcpInfo, imPplHelloParms, and a nested imPplNeighborList; each neighbor entry adds imPplNbrChassisId/PortId, imPplNbrEcpInfo, imPplExploreXmit/Recv, imPplNbrTcpInfo, imPplActiveOpen, and imPplPortalRef, keyed by the 5-tuple. Clause 7.2.3 (Instance maintenance routines): 7.2.3.1 ProcessLocalTargetRequest creates/updates/deletes a local entry and opens or shuts passive TCP sockets; 7.2.3.2 ProcessNeighborTargetRequest creates/deletes neighbor entries, reuses or creates LRP-DT instances, and builds the Portal (also called by Receive Hello on Portal approval); 7.2.3.3 PickIpAddresses chooses IPv4 vs IPv6 ends and decides, via Table 7-1, who issues the Active OPEN (both always do a Passive OPEN; ties make both go active); 7.2.3.4 ProcessTcpOpen runs accept() forever and births a passive TCP instance (no Portal) on each incoming connection. Clause 7.3 (LRP-DT instance): 7.3.1 overview (establish TCP, create/destroy Portal state machines, dispatch received LRPDUs to a Portal). 7.3.2 instance variables: 7.3.2.1 instActiveTcp, .2 instMyAddress, .3 instMyPortNumber, .4 instNeighborAddress, .5 instNeighborPortNumber, .6 instReconnectTimer, .7 instReconnectReset, .8 instTargetPortList, .9 instPortalList, .10 instKillInstance. 7.3.3 instance routines: 7.3.3.1 instReceiveLRPDU (discards Stop/unknown LRPDUs; routes Record/Partial/Complete List by matching My Portal Number to a Portal; for a Hello, finds or creates the right Portal, including exploratory-Hello handling and the lexical Chassis+Port ID tie-break that resolves duplicate TCP instances), 7.3.3.2 instCreateInstance, 7.3.3.3 instDestroyInstance (kills an instance with empty target-port list, or empty Portal list when active), 7.3.3.4 instCreatePortal (initializes Portal variables per Table 7-2, sets pamNeedHello), 7.3.3.5 instDestroyPortal (sets pamKill, removes the Portal, and destroys the instance if its Portal list empties). 7.3.4 LRP-DT instance state machine (Figure 7-1): states LI_START, LI_START_ACTIVE_OPEN, LI_OPERATIONAL, LI_LRPDU, LI_ACTIVE_TCP_FAILED, LI_RESTART, LI_TERMINATING, LI_TERMINATED — ECP needs no OPEN, only active TCP issues connect(), failures retry after instReconnectReset doubles up to lrpReconnectMax.
blocks.zh: Clause 7.2.2（实例维护变量）——7.2.2.1 imTargetPortList：驻留于每个本地或代理系统的主表。每个条目以三元组 {imPplAppId, imPplMyChassisId, imPplMyPortId} 为键，携带 imPplMyEcpEnable、imPplMyTcpInfo、imPplHelloParms 以及嵌套的 imPplNeighborList；每个邻居条目再加上 imPplNbrChassisId/PortId、imPplNbrEcpInfo、imPplExploreXmit/Recv、imPplNbrTcpInfo、imPplActiveOpen 和 imPplPortalRef，以五元组为键。Clause 7.2.3（实例维护例程）：7.2.3.1 ProcessLocalTargetRequest 创建/更新/删除本地条目并打开或关闭被动 TCP 套接字；7.2.3.2 ProcessNeighborTargetRequest 创建/删除邻居条目，复用或创建 LRP-DT 实例并构建门户（在门户获批时也由 Receive Hello 调用）；7.2.3.3 PickIpAddresses 选择 IPv4 或 IPv6 两端，并依据表 7-1 决定由谁发起主动 OPEN（双方始终做被动 OPEN；偏好冲突时双方都主动）；7.2.3.4 ProcessTcpOpen 持续调用 accept()，每来一个连接就诞生一个被动 TCP 实例（无门户）。Clause 7.3（LRP-DT 实例）：7.3.1 概述（建立 TCP、创建/销毁门户状态机、把收到的 LRPDU 派发给门户）。7.3.2 实例变量：7.3.2.1 instActiveTcp、.2 instMyAddress、.3 instMyPortNumber、.4 instNeighborAddress、.5 instNeighborPortNumber、.6 instReconnectTimer、.7 instReconnectReset、.8 instTargetPortList、.9 instPortalList、.10 instKillInstance。7.3.3 实例例程：7.3.3.1 instReceiveLRPDU（丢弃 Stop/未知 LRPDU；按 My Portal Number 匹配门户来路由 Record/Partial/Complete List；对 Hello 则查找或创建合适的门户，包括探测性 Hello 处理，以及用机箱+端口 ID 的字典序裁决来解决重复 TCP 实例），7.3.3.2 instCreateInstance，7.3.3.3 instDestroyInstance（当目标端口列表为空，或在主动状态下门户列表为空时销毁实例），7.3.3.4 instCreatePortal（按表 7-2 初始化门户变量，设置 pamNeedHello），7.3.3.5 instDestroyPortal（设置 pamKill、移除门户，若门户列表清空则销毁实例）。7.3.4 LRP-DT 实例状态机（图 7-1）：状态有 LI_START、LI_START_ACTIVE_OPEN、LI_OPERATIONAL、LI_LRPDU、LI_ACTIVE_TCP_FAILED、LI_RESTART、LI_TERMINATING、LI_TERMINATED——ECP 无需 OPEN，只有主动 TCP 才发起 connect()，失败后在 instReconnectReset 翻倍（上限 lrpReconnectMax）后重试。

blocks.en: Putting it together: an application names its own and its neighbor's target ports, LRP records that in the imTargetPortList, and from there LRP-DT instances and Portals spring into existence — over ECP for the simple Native case, or over TCP when a Proxy must reach a Controlled system across the IP network. The LRP-DS layer then exchanges Hello, Record, Partial List, and Complete List LRPDUs to keep the applicant and registrar databases identical, while LRP-DT quietly handles pacing, ordering, acknowledgment, and reconnection. The result is a clean separation of concerns: the application worries about meaning, LRP-DS worries about which records to send, and LRP-DT worries about getting bytes there reliably.
blocks.zh: 综观全局：应用指明自己和邻居的目标端口，LRP 把这些记录进 imTargetPortList，由此 LRP-DT 实例与门户便应运而生——简单的本地场景走 ECP，当代理需跨 IP 网络触达受控系统时则走 TCP。随后 LRP-DS 层交换 Hello、Record、Partial List 和 Complete List 等 LRPDU，使申请者与注册者数据库保持完全一致，而 LRP-DT 则默默处理节流、排序、确认与重连。其结果是清晰的关注点分离：应用操心含义，LRP-DS 操心该发哪些记录，LRP-DT 操心把字节可靠送达。

cites.note: Clause 6: LRP introduction, overview, objectives/non-objectives, system roles, LLDP discovery, Exploratory Hello, target port state, database structure, LRP-DT transports (ECP/TCP), LRP-DS synchronization, state machine creation, security.

Clause 7: LRP-DT procedures — instance maintenance (imTargetPortList, ProcessLocalTargetRequest, ProcessNeighborTargetRequest, PickIpAddresses, ProcessTcpOpen) and LRP-DT instance (variables, routines, state machine Figure 7-1).
